name: Amihan Gale 4T
shortDesc: Semi-synthetic motorcycle engine oil. Superior protection for modern scooters and motorcycles.
description: The Bagani Amihan Gale 4T is a semi-synthetic motorcycle engine oil engineered for modern scooters and motorcycles. The 10W-40 viscosity ensures smooth cold starts and reliable hot-weather performance.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino! — the Amihan Gale meets JASO MB standards, making it ideal for scooters with CVT transmissions.

features.title: Semi-Synthetic Formula
features.desc: Blend of synthetic and mineral base oils for enhanced performance and protection.

features.title: JASO MB Certified
features.desc: Optimized for scooters and CVT-equipped motorcycles.

features.title: Multi-Grade Viscosity
features.desc: 10W-40 provides smooth starts in any weather and consistent protection in heat.

features.title: Filipino-Made Quality
features.desc: Proudly manufactured in the Philippines for local riding conditions.

faqs.q: Is this oil good for my scooter?
faqs.a: Yes! The Amihan Gale 4T with JASO MB certification is specifically designed for scooters and CVT-equipped motorcycles.

faqs.q: What's the difference between JASO MA and MB?
faqs.a: JASO MA is for motorcycles with wet clutches, while JASO MB is optimized for scooters and bikes with CVT transmissions.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized motorcycle shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines.
